label: Weekly Check-In
transcript:
Supervisor: Thanks for joining. I wanted to start by saying your customer follow-up was much stronger this week.
Employee: I appreciate that. I tried to be more consistent.
Supervisor: It showed. The updates were timely and your notes were clear. One area to tighten is closing the loop on overdue requests.
Employee: That makes sense. I know I missed two follow-ups on Wednesday.
Supervisor: Right, and I would like to see a simple tracking habit so those do not slip next week.
Employee: I can set up a daily reminder and review open items before lunch.
Supervisor: Good plan. Let us check progress again on Friday.

label: Performance Coaching
transcript:
Supervisor: I want to talk through yesterday's client call. You handled the introduction well and kept the tone professional.
Employee: Thank you. I felt prepared for the opening.
Supervisor: Where we lost momentum was in the pricing discussion. The explanation became vague and the client had to ask the same question twice.
Employee: I noticed that too. I was not fully confident in the latest package details.
Supervisor: I appreciate your honesty. Before the next call, review the updated pricing sheet and practice two concise ways to explain the recommendation.
Employee: I can do that and send you my talking points first.
Supervisor: That would help. I also want you to end each call with a clear summary and next steps.

label: Recognition and Follow-Up
transcript:
Supervisor: I want to recognize the way you supported the new team member this week.
Employee: Thanks, I tried to make time for questions.
Supervisor: It made a difference. Your patience and clarity stood out. I also noticed that the documentation handoff was delayed by a day.
Employee: Yes, I prioritized onboarding and underestimated the wrap-up work.
Supervisor: Understood. In the future, communicate that tradeoff earlier so we can adjust expectations together.
Employee: That is fair. I will flag those tradeoffs sooner.
Supervisor: Great. Keep the strong support mindset, and let us improve the planning piece at the same time.
